decisions.SD-1_switch_route: NEW ENDPOINT — POST /api/v1/bff/session/set-brand with {brand_id} body; membership-verified 3-arg check; distinct brand.switch audit event; re-mint session. Repoint the client's switchBrand to it.
decisions.SD-2_dashboard_focus: ACTIVE-BRAND-FIRST — brand-summary reflects the currently-selected brand (name, currency, per-brand member count); switching updates it.
